H1_private_susceptibility_heterogeneity.claim: Profiles differ in direction-aware private attack susceptibility (AE_private).

H2_network_amplification_or_attenuation.claim: Post-attack peer context shifts the private attack effect (PN_increment_effectivity).

H3_central_susceptible_sender_amplificat.claim: High outgoing-reach susceptible profiles raise population-level final effect.

H4_central_resilient_sender_attenuation.claim: Central profiles with resistant private effects reduce final network effectiveness.
H4_central_resilient_sender_attenuation.note: Inspect high-reach profiles with mean_ae_private <= 0 in per_profile_network_outcomes.csv.
